name: Archival Black & White Documentary Footage
description: Vintage research footage from the 1980s-1990s era. Grainy, desaturated, low-resolution aesthetic that evokes historical authenticity and scientific credibility.

visual_attributes.lighting: Flat, natural documentary lighting with minimal contrast
visual_attributes.texture: Film grain, slight blur, degraded quality

image_gen_workflow.prompt_template: [subject description] in black and white, vintage documentary photograph style, 1980s research footage, grainy film texture, desaturated, low resolution archive quality, scientific documentation aesthetic

video_gen_workflow.motion_prompt_template: slow, methodical camera movement across [subject], vintage documentary style, grainy archive footage, minimal motion, observational framing

remotion_role: Text overlays, labels, scientific annotations - never background imagery
